children.name: dr--wdy-is-a-telemedicine-service--in-the-us-focused-on-legal-medical-cannabis
children.content: Dr. Wdy is a telemedicine service  in the US focused on legal medical cannabis

Dr.WDY is not just one doctor – we are a healthcare digital company uniting dozens of top qualified state-licensed doctors, large trusted dispensaries and client-oriented managers. Yea, all this crowd of people is here and ready to offer you a fast and convenient service. 

Being true MMJ ambassadors, we strive to educate people about the healing power of cannabis. 
Our mission in Dr.WDY is to popularize medical marijuana as a highly effective organic cure for a wide range of diseases, setting it apart from the plants acceptable for recreational use. 
And we try to do it in an amusing and light manner.

Are you with us? Then let’s start our path to recovery and enlightenment together!

children.name: our-logo-repeats-our-manifesto---we-are-clear-and-friendly--we-created-this-is-a-sign-of-quality-and-a-guarantee-of-care-and-attention-to-each-client-and-partner-
children.content:
Our logo repeats our manifesto - we are clear and friendly. 
We created this is a sign of quality and a guarantee of care and attention to each client and partner.

children.name: the-path-of-our-logo-comes-from-the-name-of-the-company-doctor-wdy--which-in-turn-has-an-abbreviated-version-of-dr-wdy-the---dot-and-double-e-s-are-converted-to-a-square-shape-that-can-enclose-graphic-elements-
children.content:
The path of our logo comes from the name of the company Dr WDY, which in turn has an abbreviated version of Dr.Wdy

The . dot and double E's are converted to a square shape that can enclose graphic elements.
